INS_Backup.description: Switch to Inertial Navigation System backup

Isolate_GPS_Feed.description: Disconnect GPS receiver from navigation system

Increase_Monitoring.description: Increase GPS signal validation and cross-check frequency

Sensor_Validation.description: Run multi-point sensor validation and calibration

Reduce_Data_Rate.description: Reduce sensor sampling frequency to filter noise

Validate_Packets.description: Increase packet validation and error checking

Activate_Firewall.description: Activate network firewall and packet filtering

Reset_Connections.description: Reset and re-authenticate all network connections
